title: Subject formation in Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Subject formation in Evangelion             Quote Post by Bondacious » Mon May 09, 2022 8:13 am Hi guys, Can we get a thread discussing the themes of subject formation in the show? I feel like it's a really interesting and often overlooked aspect of it which really shines in the last few episodes. I'd also love to analyse it through Freudian and Lacanian theory - especially Lacan's "Mirror theory"

[]: Re: Subject formation in Evangelion             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Mon May 09, 2022 11:32 am Hi! Welcome! You are free to talk whatever you want, since this doesn't break our forum rules and our discussion rule . Just go on. You can find threads covering more "psichological and philosophical" subjects in Evangelion on this board, try using our search tool .
